questions.q: Which prolific voice actor, known for playing Yoda in 'Star Wars: The Clone Wars', passed away at age 64 according to reports on May 18, 2026?
The live-action reboot of 'Masters of the Universe' had its world premiere in Los Angeles on May 18, 2026. Which actor stars as Prince Adam/He-Man?
On May 18, 2026, Netflix acquired the global rights outside France for which animated coming-of-age romance that opened the Cannes Critics' Week?
Director Na Hong-jin debuted his epic sci-fi action thriller about an alien creature attacking a rural Korean town at the 2026 Cannes Film Festival. What is the film's title?
On May 18, 2026, Paramount dropped eight new parody posters for the upcoming sixth installment of which comedy horror franchise, spoofing films like 'Get Out' and 'Sinners'?
options: Shriek If You Know What I Did
